title: Dungeons Crit Sound REMAKE
description: A pack that replaces the Player Attack sounds with Sounds From Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
# Remake of the Dungeons Crit Sound resource pack That adds more to player attack sounds
A pack that replaces the Player Attack sounds with Sounds From Minecraft Dungeons.

## Example Video By [LoganNever](https://www.youtube.com/@LoganNever)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k6YO99e5fMQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
